title: Transformers EarthSpark 1-Step Smash Changers Optimus Prime Action Figure
features: SMASH TO CHANGE MODES IN 1 STEP: Transformers action figure converts from truck to robot mode in one easy, exciting step! Tap the toy on a flat surface in truck mode to see it pop up into robot mode
2-IN-1 CONVERTING TRANSFORMERS TOY: in robot mode, children can simply fold the figure back into truck mode, then smash to convert again! Repeatable fun for children who love fidget toys!
CHANGE FROM ROBOT TO TRUCK: the Optimus Prime toy changes from a robot into a truck and back again. Easy enough for young children to do by themselves
10-CM ROBOT ACTION FIGURE: in robot mode, Optimus Prime figure is 10 centimetres (4 inches) tall
TRANSFORMERS: EARTHSPARK CHARACTERS: inspired by the noble Autobot leader, Optimus Prime, from the Transformers: EarthSpark animated series
description: Product Description Smash into action with the Transformers: EarthSpark 1-Step Smash Changer Optimus Prime action figure! Convert this Transformers action figure from truck mode into robot mode by smashing it on a flat surface! The truck toy pops up into a robot toy! With a 1-step manual conversion, children can change it from robot back to truck – then smash again for super satisfying, fidgety play! Keep an eye out for more 1-Step Smash Changers Transformers figures (each sold separately, subject to availability) featuring popular characters from the Transformers: EarthSpark TV show, an animated series that centres on two human kids as they forge a connection with Transformers robots like never before and work alongside fan favourites such as Bumblebee and Megatron! Small action figures like these 1-Step Smash Changers make great stocking fillers or small presents for children aged 6 and up! TRANSFORMERS and HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc. Safety Warning Ages 6 and up WARNING: CHOKING HAZARD – Small parts. Not for children under 3 years.
